    • Trip Segmentation and Movement Behavior
    • Trip Segmentation and Movement Behavior

Trip Segmentation and Movement Behavior

Jaylen

Source: vignettes/trip_seg.Rmd
trip_seg.Rmd

1: Trip segments

Segment the raw stream into unique trips

segmented_data <- prepared_gps_data %>% group_by(animal_id) %>% segment_trips( max_time_gap = 120, # minutes min_dist_gap = 500 # meters ) %>% ungroup()

Inspect the output

head(segmented_data)

2: Trip Classifier

Classify behaviors within each trip

classified_data <- segmented_data %>% group_by(trip_id) %>% classify_trip_phase() %>% ungroup()

View behavioral distributions

table(classified_data$movement_phase)

3: day/night labeler

Add environmental time context

final_processed_data <- classified_data %>% label_day_night_period()

Quick visualization of behavioral shifts

ggplot(final_processed_data, aes(x = movement_phase, fill = day_night)) + geom_bar(position = “dodge”) + theme_minimal() + labs(title = “Movement Phase Distribution by Diel Period”, x = “Behavioral Phase”, y = “Data Point Count”)

4: Summarize trips

Generate the high-level summary report

trip_summary <- final_processed_data %>% summarize_trips()

Display the summary table

knitr::kable(head(trip_summary), caption = “Summary Metrics per Segmented Trip”)

Developed by The package maintainer.
